name: Claude Mythos Preview
tagline: Invitation-only early Mythos-class model used by a small number of organizations for cybersecurity work; superseded by Mythos 5.
seoTitle: Claude Mythos Preview — Anthropic LLM specs
metaDescription: Claude Mythos Preview (Anthropic), released 2026-04 — part of the Claude Fable / Mythos (Mythos-class) line. Invitation-only early Mythos-class model used by a…
overview: Claude Mythos Preview is a large language model from Anthropic, part of the Claude Fable / Mythos (Mythos-class) line. Released 2026-04. Anthropic's most capable, top-end tier — a higher intelligence class than Opus, released publicly as Fable 5 with safety classifiers and to restricted partners as Mythos 5.
What's notable in this version: Invitation-only early Mythos-class model used by a small number of organizations for cybersecurity work; superseded by Mythos 5.
